block_20: Most Profitable Trade of the Week
block_46: There is a popular belief that the United States is the hub of foreign currency exchange. However, it is actually the United Kingdom that is number one in terms of forex trading. Over 40% of all transactions are conducted in the UK, while only 19% are in the US.
